rows.label: tlk4537015304_msg0001
rows.name:
The mayor told me all about
the Village Guardian.

rows.label: tlk4537015304_msg0002
rows.name:
I'd like to investigate
Spirit Crucible Elpys too,
but I can't risk danger now.

rows.label: tlk4537015304_msg0003
rows.name:
A teacher acting recklessly would
set a poor example for the kids.
I'll wait until they've all grown.
